data.name: FRESHMAN
data.detailed_description:
FRESHMAN：你的终极大学幻想

大学不仅仅是课堂、成绩和无数杯咖啡撑过的夜晚。它代表自由、探索，以及你人生中最疯狂的时刻。欢迎来到一个每场派对都是新冒险、每次暧昧都可能变成难忘激情的校园。

沉浸在一部充满笑声、诱惑与深夜激情的成人视觉小说中。你会成为魅力绅士型浪漫派、优雅狙击型调情高手，还是总能得偿所愿的自信玩家？选择——以及刺激——都在你手中。

游戏特色

  • 活出你的幻想： 结识多位迷人角色——从暗恋你的害羞新生，到永远不会拒绝派对的疯狂女孩。每段关系都可能变得更深……更火热。

  • 选择的力量： 你的言行决定一切。每个抉择都会改变关系，解锁新的告白、难忘之夜与火辣后果。

  • 掌握诱惑艺术： 从天真新人成长为校园传奇。提升魅力，探索欲望，证明你的吸引力。

  • 动态成人场景： 高品质流畅动画呈现每一个动作、触碰与喘息，让幻想成真。

  • 精致感性的视觉体验： 每一幕都具备电影级表现，让你沉浸在每次邂逅的热度中。

  • 无悔青春： 屋顶派对、寝室密会——探索一个在每扇门后都隐藏欲望的校园世界。

最刺激的冒险从现在开始。准备好进入FRESHMAN的世界了吗？

data.short_description: FRESHMAN — 一款成人、多结局选择驱动视觉小说，带你享受大学生活最美好的快感。化身新生，尽情体验自由。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version 10.11+
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡:
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Steam OS or Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: FRESHMAN
data.detailed_description:
FRESHMAN: Your Ultimate College Fantasy

College isn’t just about lectures, grades, or endless coffee-fueled nights. It’s about freedom, discovery, and saying yes to the wildest moments of your life. Welcome to a campus where every party is a new adventure, and every flirtation could turn into something unforgettable.

Immerse yourself in an adult visual novel bursting with laughter, temptation, and late-night hookups. Will you be the charming romantic, the smooth-talking flirt, or the confident player who always gets what he wants? The choice—and the thrill—is all yours.

Game Features

  • Live Your Fantasies: Meet a diverse cast of gorgeous characters—from the shy freshman with a secret crush to the wild party girl who never says no. Every connection can lead to something deeper… and hotter.

  • The Power of Choice: Your words and actions define your path. Every decision shapes your relationships, leading to new confessions, unforgettable nights, and steamy consequences.

  • Master the Art of Seduction: Go from innocent newbie to campus legend. Build your charisma, explore your limits, and prove you’re the real deal when it comes to charm and desire.

  • Animated Sex Scenes: Watch your fantasies come alive through smooth, high-quality animations that capture every motion, touch, and gasp in vivid detail.

  • Stylish & Sensual Visuals: Every scene is crafted with stunning artwork and cinematic flair, designed to make you feel the heat of every encounter.

  • A Life of No Regrets: From rooftop parties to secret dorm hookups, explore every corner of the campus where temptation lurks behind every door.

Your most thrilling adventure begins now. Do you have what it takes to dive into the world of FRESHMAN?

data.short_description: FRESHMAN — an adult, choice-based visual novel that celebrates the best parts of life. Step into the shoes of a college freshman and experience all the pleasures of student life.
data.supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Japanese
